name: Jane Doe
intro: I craft elegant, high-performance web experiences. Focused on blending minimalist design with cutting-edge engineering to solve complex problems.

about.shortBio: I am a full-stack developer passionate about open-source, system design, and building products that scale.
about.longBio: With over 5 years of experience in the industry, I have led technical teams, shipped products used by millions, and contributed significantly to open source. I believe in writing code that is not just functional, but beautiful and maintainable.
about.goals: To push the boundaries of what is possible on the web and bridge the gap between design and technical implementation.
about.vision: A digital landscape where every interaction is purposeful, fast, and accessible.

responsibilities: Led the migration of a legacy monolithic architecture to micro-frontends.
Improved Core Web Vitals by 40% through rigorous performance tuning.
Mentored junior developers and established code quality standards.
Built the MVP from scratch and scaled it to 10k daily active users.
Implemented real-time collaboration features using WebSockets.
Designed and optimized PostgreSQL database schemas.

projects.title: Aura Design System
projects.description: A comprehensive open-source React component library tailored for building premium interfaces with minimal effort. Includes fully customizable Framer Motion animations out of the box.

projects.title: Quantum DB Engine
projects.description: An experimental lightweight in-memory key-value store built in Go, focusing on high throughput and zero-allocation critical paths.
